GRYPHON/HUSKY TRACK & FIELD
2026 PRESEASON NEWSLETTER
March 1, 2026

────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Gryphon and Husky athletes, families, and supporters—welcome back to what promises to be the most electrifying season in our cooperative program's history! As we gear up for the 2026 campaign, I can barely contain my excitement for what lies ahead. The energy is already crackling through our training sessions, and I'm witnessing the incredible dedication and hunger for excellence that makes coaching this extraordinary group of student-athletes from Chesterton Academy, Eagle Ridge Academy, International School of Minnesota, and United Christian Academy such an absolute privilege. This isn't just another season—this is our moment to make history, shatter barriers, and show the entire state what happens when talent meets unwavering determination!

Our 2026 schedule is absolutely loaded with opportunities to showcase our growing dynasty, featuring twelve spectacular meets that will challenge us, elevate us, and ultimately prepare us for championship glory! We'll kick things off with our signature Gryphon/Husky Invites throughout April and May, giving our home crowd plenty of chances to witness greatness in action, before building toward the season's crescendo with the Section 6AA Championship at Delano and the ultimate prize—the MSHSL State Championship at St. Michael-Albertville. Every single meet on this schedule serves a purpose in our championship journey, from our early-season home meets where we'll fine-tune our racing tactics, to the 6AA True Team Championship at Willmar where we'll announce our arrival as a force to be reckoned with, culminating with our MCAA Championship right here on our home track where we'll defend our territory with fierce pride!

The record books are practically trembling with anticipation because our relay teams are positioned to rewrite history in 2026! Both our men's and women's relay squads are sitting right at the threshold of program immortality across all four distances—the 4x100, 4x200, 4x400, and 4x800—meaning we have eight different opportunities to etch our names permanently into Gryphon/Husky lore. These aren't just numbers on a page; they represent years of building chemistry, perfecting handoffs, and developing the kind of relay magic that can only come from athletes who trust each other completely and refuse to settle for anything less than extraordinary. When those batons start flying this spring, expect fireworks!

Leading our championship charge are our incredible returning point leaders who have already proven they know how to deliver when it matters most! On the boys' side, Dylan Mokomba returns as our defensive champion with 43.5 points, followed closely by the dynamic trio of Vladic Warzinik, Gabriel Hirano, and Jack Pham, with Noah Woodlee rounding out our top five scoring threats. Our girls' squad is absolutely loaded with firepower, led by the phenomenal Keira Guevara who dominated with 58 points last season, supported by the incredible depth of Shivani Swanson, Liila Supramaniam, Chelsea Dahlen, and Addison Colby. But here's what excites me most—to all our new athletes joining this family, I want you to know that we don't just welcome you, we expect you to succeed, because champions aren't born, they're forged through the daily commitment to excellence that defines our program. This is your time, this is our time, and together we're going to make 2026 a season that will be talked about for generations! Let's go Gryphons and Huskies—greatness awaits!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026 SEASON SCHEDULE

  April 8, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Gryphon/Husky Invite [Varsity] · Home
  April 15, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Gryphon/Husky Invite [Varsity] · Home
  April 22, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Gryphon/Husky Invite [JV] · Home
  April 25, 2026 · 9:00 AM · Gryphon/Husky Mega Meet [Varsity/JV] · Home
  May 4, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Waconia [JV] · Waconia
  May 6, 2026 · Time TBD · 6AA True Team Championship [Varsity] · Willmar
  May 11, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Gryphon/Husky Invite [JV] · Home
  May 15, 2026 · 4:00 PM · MCAA Championship [Varsity] · Home
  May 20, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Gryphon/Husky Invite [Varsity] · Home
  May 21, 2026 · 3:30 PM · Gryphon/Husky Invite [JV] · Home
  May 26 & 28, 2026 · 3:00 PM · Section 6AA Championship [Varsity] · Delano
  June 5 & 6, 2026 · 9:00 AM · MSHSL Championship [Varsity] · St. Michael-Albertville (STMA)

────────────────────────────────────────────────────

🏅
No Awards Yet
Awards are auto-detected from Conference, Sectional, and State meets. You can also manually set awards on any result in the meet detail view.
⚙ Settings App configuration and data integrity
🔗 Share with Co-Coach
Generates a self-contained HTML file with all your data embedded in it. Send this file to your co-coach — when they open it, all meets, records, athletes, and settings load automatically into their browser. No restore step needed.

Note: This is a one-time snapshot. If you add more data later, generate a new shared file to send them.
🏷 Team Names
Enter every name your team appears under on Athletic.net. These are used to identify your team in uploaded score results. Each name must be an exact match to what Athletic.net shows — no partial matching. Add one name per line.
Currently recognized:
⚙ ADMIN MODE ACTIVE
GRYPHON TRACK & FIELD · SEASON TRACKER · 2025 ·
✓ Restored — 98 meets, 76 records, 12 schedule entries
Restore backup from 3/1/2026? This will replace all current data with: • 98 meets • 76 records • 12 schedule entries This cannot be undone.
Update Team Scores
From Athletic.net → Team Scores tab → select all → paste below
Rename Meet
Export HTML
Copy the HTML below and paste it into your website editor, a text file, or share it directly.
